briefing.incidentSummary:
A student's exam portal account was accessed without permission the night before finals.

Grades were altered. The student reported the breach the next morning.

The login came from inside the school network.
briefing.missionText:
Your Mission:

› Identify who accessed the account

› Trace the login to a device

› Collect at least 3 correct evidences

› Flag the right suspect

suspects.name: Riya S
suspects.profileNotes: Was seen in the computer lab late that evening. Her own device shows a browser search for 'how to reset portal password' at 10:15 PM.

suspects.name: Arjun T
suspects.profileNotes: Had lab access keys but logged out at 9:30 PM. Alibi confirmed by CCTV timestamp.

suspects.name: Ms. Priya
suspects.profileNotes: Only accessed admin panel during school hours. No activity recorded after 5 PM.

suspects.name: Karan M
suspects.profileNotes: Was in the canteen during the breach window. Multiple witnesses present.

items.label: I can get into his account, easy.
items.detail: Riya S sent this message to a group chat at 10:02 PM — 90 minutes before the breach. Direct evidence of intent.

items.label: Done. Changed his history grade to a C.
items.detail: Sent at 11:48 PM. Timestamp matches the breach window exactly. Admission of the act.

items.label: I was home by 9. Not my problem.
items.detail: Arjun claims he left early. Corroborated by CCTV logs.

items.label: grade_change_log.txt
items.detail: System log showing grade field for student ID 1142 was modified at 11:39 PM from A to C. Modified from LAB-PC-07.

items.label: browser_history_LAB07.txt
items.detail: LAB-PC-07 browser history shows portal login page visited at 11:31 PM. Search for victim's student ID at 11:29 PM.

hiddenItem.label: sticky_note_scan.jpg
hiddenItem.detail: A scanned image of a sticky note found on LAB-PC-07 with the victim's username and a guessed password written in handwriting matching Riya S.

minigame.title: Unlock Lab PC Evidence
minigame.hint: Caesar shift -3. What did Riya write down?
hints: It is a very common word related to account access.

onSuccess.message: sticky_note_scan.jpg is now available in your file feed.

items.label: LAB-PC-07
items.detail: School computer lab machine. Last login session: 11:28 PM to 11:46 PM. No admin login — regular student account used.

items.label: Last Logged In User
items.detail: The guest account used on LAB-PC-07 was traced back to Riya S's school login via session token. Login at 11:28 PM matches breach window.

items.label: Lab Machine IP
items.detail: IP 192.168.1.44 is assigned to LAB-PC-07. The portal breach request originated from this IP at 11:32 PM.

timeline.title: Suspicious Chat Message
timeline.description: Riya S sends boastful message in group chat

timeline.title: Portal Accessed
timeline.description: Victim's exam portal login page opened

timeline.title: Grade Modified
timeline.description: History grade changed from A to C

timeline.title: Brag Message Sent
timeline.description: Riya S confirms the act in group chat

perfect.title: Case Solved!
perfect.subtitle: Riya S is identified as the perpetrator.
perfect.label: CASE CLOSED

partial.title: Insufficient Evidence
partial.subtitle: Correct suspect but thin evidence chain.
partial.label: PARTIAL

wrongAccusation.title: Wrong Suspect
wrongAccusation.subtitle: The real culprit was Riya S.
wrongAccusation.label: CASE FAILED

aria.welcomeToHub:
...A student's future was tampered with.
The breach was personal. The motive was clear.
Find who did this.
aria.exploreFeeds:
School networks leave traces everywhere.
Chat logs. Browser history. Login tokens.
Dig in.
aria.viewEvidence:
Something here doesn't add up.
Read it carefully before you mark it.
aria.markEvidence:
Good. Keep collecting.
You need a solid chain before you can point fingers.
aria.decryptionHint:
Someone left a note behind.
Decode it — it might be the smoking gun.
aria.flagSuspect:
A trace is forming.
You're on to something — keep pulling the thread.
More fragments remain. Don't stop now.
